text: No water in Block C second floor since morning, taps completely dry

Router blinking red on floor 3 Block B, no connection

Garbage bins overflowing near the mess entrance, smells terrible
Mosquitoes everywhere because of stagnant dirty water behind Block C
The corridor of Block A second floor is full of dust and trash
Dead rat smell in the common room of Block B, needs pest control
Mess food quality has dropped badly this month

paani nahi aa raha Block B mein subah se
nal se paani tapak raha hai pura din, Block C teesri manzil
bijli chali gayi hai poore Block A mein

wifi band hai kal raat se Block C mein, online class miss ho gayi
net bahut slow hai Block A mein, kuch load nahi hota
safai nahi hui hai bathroom ki teen din se Block D mein

machhar bahut ho gaye hain Block B ke peeche gandagi ki wajah se
pani nathi avtu Block A ma be divas thi
light nathi aavti amara room ma, Block C bija male
wifi chalu nathi Block D ma aakho divas thi
geyser thi garam pani nathi avtu Block B ma
aag lagne jaisi smell aa rahi hai wiring se Block A first floor
jhatka laga mujhe washing machine se Block C laundry room mein

Everything is broken in this hostel, nothing works, I am done
